summary_en: 500,000 shares (4.8% of S/O) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on May 15, 2026 at closing price of ¥1,386/share; upper limit ¥693M. Settlement and cancellation scheduled May 29, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Purchase via ToSTNeT-3 Off-Exchange Trading, and Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Kyowa Nissei's board resolved to acquire up to 500,000 treasury shares (4.8% of shares outstanding) via off-exchange trading (ToSTNeT-3) on May 15, 2026 at the prior day's closing price of ¥1,386 per share, for a total outlay not exceeding ¥693 million. The order will be placed at 8:45 a.m. and is valid for that trading session only. The board also resolved to cancel all acquired shares effective May 29, 2026. The acquisition is undertaken to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency as part of the company's capital allocation strategy.
